data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "_has_rebar_id_label now requires a non-empty id after the prefix; empty/malformed markers are treated as unmarked (adoptable) so a key can't be stranded, while well-formed rebar-id:<id> still stands down. RED->GREEN + mutation-checked; reconciler suite green (1129). Merged; operational 'landed' AC not statically verifiable.". Session: 210396a7f.
